LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Allowed.description: Navigating the world in vehicles is an accepted practice in our community.
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Allowed.label: allowed
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Approved.description: Every drive on land affirms our shared spirit and joy.
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Approved.label: approved
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Forbidden.description: To traverse the land in vehicles is a violation of our core beliefs.
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Forbidden.label: forbidden
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Horrible.description: We see setting foot in a land vehicle as a profound offense to our values.
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Horrible.label: horrible
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.description: Our people believe in the necessity of movement, to not drive is to neglect one's duty to oneself.
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.label: required
